zh.lifeSummary: 當Alianore De Ferriers於大約1273年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾時，她的父親Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby35歲，母親Alianore de Bohun26歲。她於1290年3月11日之前與Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1300年在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德享年28歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alianore De Ferriers于大约1273年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾时，她的父亲Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby35岁，母亲Alianore de Bohun26岁。她于1290年3月11日之前与Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1300年在英国賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferriers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Americo, Armando, Augusto, Carlos, Ferando, Jacinto, Jaime, Luiz, Manuel, Marta, Pedro.  Italian Antonio, Antonietta, Marcello, Silvio.
Italian (southern): variant of   Ferrera  , itself a variant of   Ferrara  .
Portuguese and Hispanic: variant of   Ferreira  .

variants.name: Ferrera
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Manuel, Rafael, Augusto, Francisco, Jorge, Jose, Luis, Miguel, Pedro, Ramona, Ricardo.  Italian Salvatore, Antonio, Biagio, Domenic, Sal, Aldo, Angelo, Attilio, Carmelo, Elio, Enrico.
Italian: habitational name from Ferrera Cenisio (now Moncenisio) in Piedmont, or Ferrera di Varese and Ferrera Erbognone, both in Lombardy.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Alianore De Ferriers was born about 1273, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby, was 35 and her mother, Alianore de Bohun, was 26. She married Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter before 11 March 1290, in Westminster, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1300, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alianore De Ferriers est née environ 1273, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Alianore de Bohun, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter avant 11 mars 1290, à Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1300, à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 28 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alianore De Ferriers um 1273 in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby 35 und ihre Mutter Alianore de Bohun 26. Sie hat vor 11. März 1290 in Westminster, Middlesex, England Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1300 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alianore De Ferriers è nata il circa 1273 nel Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Alianore de Bohun, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter prima del 11 marzo 1290, nel Westminster, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1300, nel Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 28 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alianore De Ferriersが約1273年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derbyは35歳，母Alianore de Bohunは26歳であった。1290年3月11日以前にイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターでSir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1300年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードで28歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alianore De Ferriers(이)가 대략 1273년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alianore de Bohun(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1290년 3월 11일 이전 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에서 Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.of, Southoe & Keysto, Leicestershire, En: Ratae Coritanorum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alianore De Ferriers nasceu aproximadamente 1273, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Alianore de Bohun, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter antes 11 de março de 1290, em Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1300, em Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 28 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alianore De Ferriers родилась около 1273 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alianore de Bohun, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter перед 11 марта 1290 г. в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1300 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 28 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alianore De Ferriers nació aproximadamente 1273, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Robert de Ferrers 6th Earl of Derby, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Alianore de Bohun, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir Robert FitzWalter 1st Lord FitzWalter antes de 11 de marzo de 1290, en Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1300, en Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 28 años.
